description: Test suite for dna-extraction skill — Language Registry, archetype selection, anti-pattern detection

tests.prompt: ATOMIZE this JD: 'Clio is looking for a Revenue Operations Manager to build our RevOps function from the ground up. You'll work with Sales, CS, and Finance to design processes, own the tech stack, and drive analytics. 5+ years in RevOps or related, experience with Salesforce, HubSpot, and Tableau preferred.'
